content_gaps: The SERPs lack a deep emotional connection between the raven's symbolism (wisdom, magic, protection) and the specific qualities of a mother.
There is no rich storytelling or narrative content; pages state mythological facts (Odin's ravens) but don't weave them into a compelling gift-giving story.
The results are highly transactional (product listings). There is a significant gap for content that frames a raven necklace as a uniquely thoughtful and personal gift, moving beyond just aesthetics.
Top results are dominated by marketplaces like Etsy. There is an opportunity to highlight the value of a single artisan's handcrafted work versus mass-produced items.
